SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Configure CookieLocaleResolver to handle user language preferences via cookies.
Configure ResourceBundleMessageSource to load localized messages from properties files.
Add interceptor to allow changing the locale via a URL parameter.
Register the locale change interceptor with the Spring MVC registry.
Configure static resource handlers for uploads and standard classpath locations.
Implement WebMvcConfigurer interface to enable MVC configuration overrides.
Fix spacing and formatting issues in existing code for consistency.
Replace in-memory ApplicationMemory storage with a database-backed LokacijaService for persistence.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Autowired LokacijaService and replaced memorijaAplikacije.get() calls with service.findAll(), service.save(), etc.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Switch from manual HTML string concatenation to Spring ModelAndView for template rendering.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed index() return type to ModelAndView and added addObject for 'lokacije' list.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Add functionality to upload and store location images on the server filesystem.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Added MultipartFile parameter, UUID filename generation, and Files.copy to 'uploads' directory.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Separate edit and delete operations into distinct GET (form display) and POST (action) endpoints.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Split edit() into GET returning ModelAndView and POST handling update; changed delete to GET.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update controller to use the Kontinenti enum instead of String for continent data.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed @RequestParam String kontinent to @RequestParam Kontinenti kontinent.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Remove imports related to the removed in-memory storage and old model classes.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Removed import for Lokacije and added imports for java.nio.file and UUID.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Change the continent field type from String to an enum for type safety.
Add a new field to store the path to the location image.
Add a default no-argument constructor required for Spring MVC @ModelAttribute binding.
Update existing constructors to accept the new enum type and image path field.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: public Lokacija(Long id, String grad, String drzava, Kontinenti kontinent, String putanjaDoSlike)

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update getter and setter for the continent field to use the new enum type.
Add getter and setter methods for the new image path field.
Add a toString method for easier debugging and logging of the object state.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: @Override public String toString() { return id + ";" + Grad + ";" + Drzava + ";" + Kontinent; }

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 8.
Add Gson library for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Jackson Databind for JSON processing.
Add Jackson JSR310 module for Java 8+ date/time API support.
Add Jsoup library for HTML parsing.
Add Spring Boot Starter JDBC for database connectivity.
Add jQuery UI webjar for UI components.
Update the main application class name in the Maven compiler plugin configuration.
Explicitly set Maven compiler source and target to Java 11.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to produce executable JARs.
Add JVM arguments to open java.time module for reflection access, likely required for newer JDKs.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.general_idea: Change the Eclipse JRE system library reference from JavaSE-1.8 to JavaSE-11 to align with the project's target Java version.
Add classpath entries for generated annotation processing sources to support modern Java build features.
Add classpath entries for generated test annotation processing sources to support modern Java build features.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.project.general_idea: Rename the Eclipse project description name from 'SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat' to 'OWP-Projekat'.
Add Spring Boot validation builder to the Eclipse project configuration.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Add explicit UTF-8 encoding configuration for the test resources directory in Eclipse project settings.
Change the bytecode generation target from Java 8 to Java 11 to ensure compatibility with the new runtime environment.
Set the compiler compliance level to Java 11 to allow usage of Java 11 language features.
Set the source code level to Java 11 to enable parsing of Java 11 syntax.
Configure the compiler to generate line numbers, local variables, and source file information in the debug attributes.
Instruct the compiler to preserve unused local variables in the debug information.
Change the reporting level for preview features from ignore to warning to alert developers about their usage.
Explicitly disable annotation processing in the Eclipse compiler settings.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/reso.general_idea: Enable Thymeleaf template engine to support server-side rendering of HTML templates.
Configure maximum file and request sizes to support large file uploads.
Define MySQL database connection properties including driver, URL, and credentials.
Disable explicit session timeout configuration by commenting it out.
Add HTTP meta tags to prevent browser caching of the page.
Introduce embedded CSS to style the form and body for better visual presentation.
Correct HTML syntax by adding missing id attributes to inputs and labels, and fixing closing tags.
Correct spelling errors in labels and option values (e.g., Drzava to Država, Antartik to Antartika).
Add a new continent option 'Okeanija' to the selection dropdown.
Add HTTP meta tags to prevent browser caching of the form page to ensure fresh data is always loaded.
